channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10215] disk2_5-ldiskfs.tar.bz2 is not packaged into test rpm
item.description:
disk2_5-ldiskfs.tar.bz2 not included in th RPM means it's not really being tested in maloo.

And of course since it's not being tested, nobody knows it actually fails in conf-sanity test 32b too.
item.summary: disk2_5-ldiskfs.tar.bz2 is not packaged into test rpm

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55444/
Subject: LU-10215 tests: remove disk2_4 disk2_5 images
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_15
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 4cdd62f21a6c56dd73673fb80724f85a3221661a

"Li Dongyang <dongyangli@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55444
Subject: LU-10215 tests: remove disk2_4 disk2_5 images
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_15
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 25010dd945284a47cb9a15e6488ce59d6b6f8a70

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/47281/
Subject: LU-10215 tests: remove disk2_4 disk2_5 images
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: add70ce9cdc3e2d6148dafeef587d12d0277744c

"Wei Liu <sarah@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/47281
Subject: LU-10215 tests: Add disk2_5-ldiskfs.tar.bz2 into Makefile
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: bd03b6109abbb630b5d73ec6561f428c4723ce76
Assign to Sarah as discussed in the patch.

Hm, looks like symlinks processing have changed? The image before and after upgrade has different symlink inode numbers, only symlinks appear to be affected

 -rwxr-xr-x 1 0 0  2261 1282455365 oddjobd
 -rwxr-xr-x 1 0 0  2262 1270025191 rsyslog
 -rwxr-xr-x 1 0 0  2296 1289554952 udev-post
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956452 S00microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956453 K99microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956453 K99microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956453 S00microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956454 K99microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956454 S00microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956455 S00microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956452 S98libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956453 K02libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956453 K02libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956454 K02libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956454 K02libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956454 S98libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
-lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956455 S98libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956510 S00microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956511 K99microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956511 K99microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956512 K99microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956512 S00microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956512 S00microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 23 1433956513 S00microcode_ctl -> ../init.d/microcode_ctl
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956510 S98libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956511 K02libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956511 K02libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956512 K02libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956512 K02libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956512 S98libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
+lrwxrwxrwx 1 0 0 24 1433956513 S98libvirt-guests -> ../init.d/libvirt-guests
 -r-xr-xr-x 1 0 0  2442 1289551139 lvm2-monitor
 -rwxr-xr-x 1 0 0  2515 1289565046 nscd
 -rwxr-xr-x 1 0 0  2521 1289557304 sssd

Any ideas?

The failute was basically this:

DIFF OUTPUT where only fids changed
conf-sanity test_32b: @@@@@@ FAIL: list verification failed
conf-sanity test_32b: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_32b failed with 1
I totally expect this patch to fail - in the debug output we can see the fids changed so probably it was generated on a 32bit system and wrongly marked as 64bit?

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/30002
Subject: LU-10215 tests: Package disk2_5-ldiskfs.tar.bz2 into tests rpm
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: c99a3912914652ed72abe36aa7b08af86b646e15
